CreatorSkills.title: My skills
CreatorSkills.description: Manage and optimize the AI capabilities available to your account.
CreatorSkills.allSkillsDescription: The combined list available to your account.
CreatorSkills.platformSkillsTitle: Platform skills added to your list
CreatorSkills.platformSkillsDescription: Curated OceanSkill entries you chose from the marketplace.
CreatorSkills.uploadedSkillsDescription: Private creator skills. The current plan includes up to {limit, number} skills.
CreatorSkills.emptyAll: No skills have been added yet.
CreatorSkills.emptyPlatform: No platform skills have been added yet. Open a skill detail page and choose Add to my skill list.
CreatorSkills.emptyUploaded: You have not uploaded a private skill yet.
CreatorSkills.addSkillHint: The free plan allows up to 5 uploaded skills
CreatorSkills.limitDescription: You can currently upload up to {limit} private skills. Each 5,000 VND payment adds one slot, and you can pay a larger multiple to add several slots at once. Platform skills do not count toward this limit.
CreatorSkills.noSlotsTitle: You have not purchased additional skill slots
CreatorSkills.noSlotsDescription: The free plan allows up to 5 uploaded skills. Buy another slot to continue publishing new skills.
CreatorSkills.removeFailed: Could not remove this skill from your list. Please try again.
CreatorSkills.empty: You have not created a private skill yet.
CreatorSkills.contentHidden: Protected content is hidden from dashboard previews.

placeholders.title: My research workflow
placeholders.description: Explain what this skill helps your agent accomplish.
placeholders.content:
# My skill

Paste SKILL.md here, or upload the ZIP/RAR package beside it...
placeholders.bundle: Optional ZIP or RAR with exactly one SKILL.md and up to 50 reference files. Scripts are scanned, hash-pinned, and never executed by OceanSkill.

CreatorSkills.securityDescription: Uploads are identity-checked, owner-scoped by RLS, normalized, scanned, forced private, and re-authorized on every MCP request.
CreatorSkills.success: Your private skill is active and ready through MCP.
CreatorSkills.scanFailed: The skill did not pass the static scan. Review the checks below.
CreatorSkills.createFailed: The skill could not be created. Check the allowance, unique slug, and database migration.
CreatorSkills.invalidForm: Review the highlighted fields and try again.
CreatorSkills.mcpHint: Use list_purchased_skills in your MCP client to see private skills, then call get_skill_md with the skill ID.
